ast.name: appendText
ast.source: To access from your phone, change the host setting above to
ast.target: 要从手机访问，请将上方的主机设置更改为

ast.name: error
ast.target: [语音] 切换语音跟踪失败：

ast.name: error
ast.source: [Teleprompter] WebSocket module failed to load - Stream Deck integration unavailable
ast.target: [Teleprompter] WebSocket 模块加载失败 - Stream Deck 集成不可用

ast.name: error
ast.source: [TeleprompterWS] Plugin will continue without WebSocket support
ast.target: [TeleprompterWS] 插件将在没有 WebSocket 支持的情况下继续运行

ast.name: error
ast.target: [TeleprompterWS] 向客户端发送数据失败：

ast.name: error
ast.source: [TeleprompterWS] Failed to get local network IP:
ast.target: [TeleprompterWS] 获取本地网络 IP 失败：

ast.name: error
ast.target: [Teleprompter] 启动 WebSocket 服务器失败：

ast.name: error
ast.target: [Teleprompter] 停止 WebSocket 服务器时出错：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Move low-frequency controls into the ⋯ More menu and keep the essentials on the bar. Reversible — re-pin anything below.
ast.target: 将低频控件移入⋯更多菜单，将常用项保留在工具栏上。此操作可逆——可随时重新固定下方任何项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Start websocket server when Obsidian loads
ast.target: Obsidian 加载时启动 WebSocket 服务器

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Server host address (127.0.0.1 recommended for security)
ast.target: 服务器主机地址（出于安全考虑，推荐使用 127.0.0.1）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 客户端连接/断开时显示通知

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Broadcast scroll position to connected devices for multi-device sync. Other devices can follow this teleprompter.
ast.target: 将滚动位置广播到已连接设备，实现多设备同步。其他设备可以跟随此提词器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How often to broadcast scroll position during playback. Lower = smoother sync but more network traffic. (50-500ms)
ast.target: 播放期间广播滚动位置的频率。数值越低，同步越流畅，但网络流量越大。（50-500ms）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allow the plugin to connect to the streaming software
ast.target: 允许插件连接到推流软件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically connect to streaming software when the plugin loads
ast.target: 插件加载时自动连接到推流软件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Start streaming software recording when teleprompter plays, stop when reset
ast.target: 提词器播放时开始推流软件录制，重置时停止

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Start streaming software streaming when teleprompter plays, stop when reset
ast.target: 提词器播放时开始推流软件推流，重置时停止

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You can re-enable this in settings
ast.target: 您可以在设置中重新启用此功能

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Sample teleprompter text that shows your current settings in real-time as you make changes...
ast.target: 示例提词器文本，可在您进行更改时实时显示当前设置...

ast.name: warn
ast.source: One of your code blocks includes unescaped HTML. This is a potentially serious security risk.
ast.target: 您的一个代码块包含未转义的 HTML。这是一个潜在的严重安全风险。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 已应用推荐工具栏布局

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Non-localhost binding exposes the server to the network
ast.target: 非 localhost 绑定会将服务器暴露到网络

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 语音跟踪：正在重新同步——请继续阅读

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 提词器：无效的笔记路径

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Comfortable shows a text label under each icon (easier to hit live); compact is icon-only.
ast.target: 舒适模式在每个图标下方显示文本标签（直播时更易点击）；紧凑模式仅显示图标。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Native uses Obsidian’s Lucide icons (consistent with the rest of Obsidian and your Stream Deck keys). Custom uses the bespoke Teleprompter Plus icon set.
ast.target: 原生模式使用 Obsidian 的 Lucide 图标（与 Obsidian 其他部分及您的 Stream Deck 按键保持一致）。自定义模式使用专为 Teleprompter Plus 设计的图标集。

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 自动滚动开始前的秒数（0-30）

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 提词器打开时自动开始播放

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 每次 +/- 按键的调整量 (0.1-2)

ast.name: desc
ast.source: How much to dim text outside the focus area (0.1-0.5)
ast.target: 焦点区域外文本的变暗程度 (0.1-0.5)

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Lines above/below eyeline to keep bright (1-10)
ast.target: 视线行上下保持明亮的行数 (1-10)

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 显示自播放开始以来的计时器

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Compact: click to toggle. Full: show both times
ast.target: 紧凑模式：点击切换。完整模式：显示两个时间

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 用于估算的每分钟字数 (100-250)

ast.name: desc
ast.source: How the teleprompter scrolls to match speech
ast.target: 提词器如何滚动以匹配语音

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Maximum words to scroll at once (smaller = smoother, 2-30)
ast.target: 一次滚动的最大单词数（越小越平滑，2-30）

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Minimum words before scrolling (smaller = more frequent, 1-10)
ast.target: 滚动前的最小单词数（越小越频繁，1-10）

ast.name: desc
ast.source: How often to match speech (lower = more responsive, 100-1000ms)
ast.target: 匹配语音的频率（越低响应越快，100-1000毫秒）

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 基础滚动动画时长（越高越平滑，100-1500毫秒）

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Extra time per word jumped (higher = smoother for big jumps, 10-200ms)
ast.target: 每次跳转单词的额外时间（越高，大跳跃时越平滑，10-200毫秒）

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Time without speech before pausing scroll (500-3000ms)
ast.target: 无语音后暂停滚动的时间 (500-3000毫秒)

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Where current word appears on screen (10% = near top with more text below, 50% = middle)
ast.target: 当前单词在屏幕上的位置（10% = 靠近顶部，下方文本更多，50% = 居中）

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the prompter runs AHEAD of you, raise this. Anchors the scroll this many words behind the word you just spoke. Re-toggle voice tracking (V) to apply.
ast.target: 如果提词器运行在您前面，请调高此值。将滚动锚定在您刚说出的单词后这么多单词处。重新切换语音跟踪 (V) 以应用。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Lower = calmer/slower glide, higher = snappier (value ×100, so 16 = 0.16). Re-toggle voice tracking (V) to apply.
ast.target: 越低越平稳/滑动越慢，越高越敏捷（值 ×100，所以 16 = 0.16）。重新切换语音跟踪 (V) 以应用。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Paint a karaoke-style marker on the word you are speaking. Off (default) = the page still scrolls smoothly to follow your voice, but no per-word box jumps around — easier to keep your place. Re-toggle voice tracking (V) to apply.
ast.target: 在您正在说的单词上绘制卡拉OK风格的标记。关闭（默认）= 页面仍会平滑滚动以跟随您的声音，但没有逐词跳动的方框——更容易保持位置。重新切换语音跟踪 (V) 以应用。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Only applies when "Highlight the current word" is on. Fine-tunes where the highlight sits relative to the word you are speaking. 0 = on the recognized word. If the highlight feels AHEAD of you, go negative (-1, -2). If it feels BEHIND, go positive (+1, +2). Re-toggle voice tracking (V) to apply.
ast.target: 仅在“高亮当前单词”开启时适用。微调高亮相对于您正在说的单词的位置。0 = 在识别的单词上。如果高亮感觉在您前面，请设为负数 (-1, -2)。如果感觉在后面，请设为正数 (+1, +2)。重新切换语音跟踪 (V) 以应用。

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 要使用的语音引擎（推荐自动检测）

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Select a voice preset (22 neural voices available with Kokoro)
ast.target: 选择语音预设（Kokoro 提供 22 种神经语音）

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Language code for speech (e.g., en, pt, fr)
ast.target: 语音的语言代码（例如 en, pt, fr）

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Cloud, PAID service. Your script text is sent to ElevenLabs and playback uses your account credits. Bring your own key from elevenlabs.io. Used only when the engine above is set to ElevenLabs; offline engines stay available.
ast.target: 云端付费服务。您的脚本文本将发送到 ElevenLabs，播放将使用您的账户额度。请从 elevenlabs.io 获取您自己的密钥。仅当上方引擎设置为 ElevenLabs 时使用；离线引擎保持可用。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Flash = fastest/cheapest, Turbo = low latency, Multilingual = best quality
ast.target: Flash = 最快/最便宜，Turbo = 低延迟，Multilingual = 最佳质量

ast.name: desc
ast.source: ElevenLabs voice ID. Default is Rachel (21m00Tcm4TlvDq8ikWAM). Find more in your ElevenLabs Voice Library; paste a cloned-voice ID here too.
ast.target: ElevenLabs 语音 ID。默认是 Rachel (21m00Tcm4TlvDq8ikWAM)。在您的 ElevenLabs 语音库中查找更多；也可以在此处粘贴克隆语音的 ID。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Path to .bib file (relative to vault root)
ast.target: .bib 文件的路径（相对于保险库根目录）

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Skip fenced code blocks when reading
ast.target: 读取时跳过围栏代码块

ast.name: description
ast.source: Default setting. Works well for most speakers at normal pace.
ast.target: 默认设置。适用于大多数以正常语速演讲的演讲者。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read your script aloud — ElevenLabs cloud voices, or offline Kokoro / macOS / Web Speech
ast.target: 大声朗读您的脚本——ElevenLabs 云端语音，或离线 Kokoro / macOS / Web Speech

ast.name: description
ast.source: The prompter follows your voice and scrolls smoothly to keep your place
ast.target: 提词器跟随您的声音并平滑滚动以保持您的位置

ast.name: description
ast.source: Cleaner Obsidian-native settings with a status dashboard and density options
ast.target: 更简洁的 Obsidian 原生设置，带有状态仪表板和密度选项

ast.name: error
ast.target: 速度必须在 0.1 到 100 之间

ast.name: error
ast.source: Font size must be between 8 and 200
ast.target: 字体大小必须在 8 到 200 之间

ast.name: error
ast.source: Countdown must be between 0 and 3600 seconds
ast.target: 倒计时必须在 0 到 3600 秒之间

ast.name: error
ast.source: Scroll amount must be between -10000 and 10000
ast.target: 滚动量必须在 -10000 到 10000 之间

ast.name: error
ast.target: 索引必须在 0 到 1000 之间

ast.name: error
ast.target: 标题 ID 过长（最多 200 个字符）

ast.name: error
ast.target: 标题 ID 包含无效字符

ast.name: label
ast.target: 自动检测 (Kokoro > macOS Say > Web Speech)

ast.name: label
ast.target: ElevenLabs（云端，付费——需要 API 密钥）

ast.name: message
ast.target: 无法识别的消息格式。预期：{\"command\": \"...\"} 或 {\"type\": \"ping\"}

ast.name: name
ast.target: 滚动轨迹（语音落后词数）

ast.name: name
ast.target: 高亮偏移（语音领先/落后词数）

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure which controls appear in the teleprompter toolbar
ast.target: 配置提词器工具栏中显示的控件

ast.name: text
ast.source: Always visible in the main toolbar
ast.target: 始终在主工具栏中可见

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure all teleprompter features and their settings
ast.target: 配置所有提词器功能及其设置

ast.name: text
ast.source: Save and manage complete configuration profiles
ast.target: 保存和管理完整的配置文件

ast.name: text
ast.source: Save your current settings as a profile
ast.target: 将当前设置保存为配置文件

ast.name: text
ast.target: 将当前设置保存为配置文件

ast.name: text
ast.source: When enabled, this teleprompter becomes the "master" and broadcasts its scroll position. Other devices can connect via websocket and follow along in sync.
ast.target: 启用后，此提词器将成为“主控”并广播其滚动位置。其他设备可通过 WebSocket 连接并同步跟随。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Control the teleprompter from your phone or tablet:
ast.target: 通过手机或平板电脑控制提词器：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Ensure your phone is on the same network as this computer
ast.target: 确保您的手机与此电脑在同一网络中

ast.name: text
ast.source: Open the address above in your phone's browser
ast.target: 在手机浏览器中打开上述地址

ast.name: text
ast.source: Use the play/pause button to control playback
ast.target: 使用播放/暂停按钮控制播放

ast.name: text
ast.source: Adjust speed, jump to sections, and more from your phone
ast.target: 从手机调整速度、跳转到章节等

ast.name: text
ast.source: To control the teleprompter from external devices:
ast.target: 要从外部设备控制提词器：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Ensure the server is running (see status above)
ast.target: 确保服务器正在运行（参见上方状态）

ast.name: text
ast.source: Install the plugin for your control device
ast.target: 为您的控制设备安装插件

ast.name: text
ast.source: Add actions to your device buttons

ast.name: text
ast.source: By default, the server only accepts local connections for security.
ast.target: 默认情况下，出于安全考虑，服务器仅接受本地连接。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Integrate with streaming software for recording and streaming sync
ast.target: 与流媒体软件集成，实现录制和直播同步

ast.name: text
ast.source: To enable streaming integration, follow these steps:
ast.target: 要启用流媒体集成，请按照以下步骤操作：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Open the streaming software (version 28 or later)
ast.target: 打开流媒体软件（版本 28 或更高）

ast.name: text
ast.source: Go to tools menu, then websocket server settings
ast.target: 转到工具菜单，然后选择 WebSocket 服务器设置

ast.name: text
ast.target: 如果需要，设置密码（可选）

ast.name: text
ast.source: Apply the settings and close the dialog
ast.target: 应用设置并关闭对话框

ast.name: text
ast.source: Enter the same settings above and click connect
ast.target: 输入相同的设置并点击连接

ast.name: text
ast.source: Version 28 and later has the websocket server built-in.
ast.target: 版本 28 及更高版本内置了 WebSocket 服务器。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 为 Obsidian 社区而构建。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 采用现代网络技术构建。

ast.name: text
ast.source: If this plugin helps your workflow, consider supporting its development!
ast.target: 如果此插件对您的工作流程有帮助，请考虑支持其开发！
